channel.title: ramalauw
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from ramalauw

item.title: GUYS! PLEASE COME THROUGH WITH RIO RECS! Also who wants to haaang? I wanna check out the coolest blocos 😍 And I wanna make lots of Brazil videos. Anyone or any brand wanna collab? 🥺 #brazil
item.description: GUYS! PLEASE COME THROUGH WITH RIO RECS! Also who wants to haaang? I wanna check out the coolest blocos 😍 And I wanna make lots of Brazil videos. Anyone or any brand wanna collab? 🥺 #brazil

item.title: It’s been raining so hard these past two days 😭 I need to see Rio in the sun asaaaap 🥺☀️🇧🇷✨
item.description: It’s been raining so hard these past two days 😭 I need to see Rio in the sun asaaaap 🥺☀️🇧🇷✨

item.title: I've never seen SO much glitter 🥺🧚🫶✨ Guys which parties should I go to for Carnaval? I'm so bad at planning and I feel like parties must have sold out already but if you guys have any info pls Imk 😤😡 Also if you see me on the streets of Rio, say hi! And t
item.description: I've never seen SO much glitter 🥺🧚🫶✨ Guys which parties should I go to for Carnaval? I'm so bad at planning and I feel like parties must have sold out already but if you guys have any info pls Imk 😤😡 Also if you see me on the streets of Rio, say hi! And t

item.title: I honestly came to Brazil with such a high expectation and everything has lived up to the hype ✨✨✨
item.description: I honestly came to Brazil with such a high expectation and everything has lived up to the hype ✨✨✨

item.title: Happy to report that I’m still ✨better than everyone✨ 🥺🤭😮‍💨🫶🧚💅✨ #BetterThanEveryone #BTEFace #MainCharacter
item.description: Happy to report that I’m still ✨better than everyone✨ 🥺🤭😮‍💨🫶🧚💅✨ #BetterThanEveryone #BTEFace #MainCharacter

item.title: The answer is all of Brazil apparently 😮‍💨🇧🇷🫶✨ Brazil, I swear I’ve never ever felt more alive than today at this moment 🥹✨✨✨
item.description: The answer is all of Brazil apparently 😮‍💨🇧🇷🫶✨ Brazil, I swear I’ve never ever felt more alive than today at this moment 🥹✨✨✨

item.title: Cristo Redentor really said “have fun but keep it cute 🫶” 😂 #brazil #carnaval
item.description: Cristo Redentor really said “have fun but keep it cute 🫶” 😂 #brazil #carnaval

item.title: This is me for the rest of the year 😮‍💨 Reminder if you’re trying to learn a new language and want to try @Preply you can use my code RAMA50 for 50% off your first class 🤭 #brasil
item.description: This is me for the rest of the year 😮‍💨 Reminder if you’re trying to learn a new language and want to try @Preply you can use my code RAMA50 for 50% off your first class 🤭 #brasil

item.title: A little reflection om why I enjoyed Carnaval in Brazil so much 🇧🇷 Just a few more videos about Carnaval and we’re moving on to the next destination 🥹

item.title: This was filmed 1 week ago right after @boitolo One of the best experiences of my life for sure 🎉 ✨

item.title: Me and @virginiagosal can ✨therapy talk✨ our way through anything? 🫶✨ Who has a bigger ✨PTSD (Post-Tröomatic Stress Dumptruqué✨? 😮‍💨 Rama 💃 or Virginia 💅?

item.title: How come in the English-speaking world, nobody ever apologizes to tourists for not speaking another language fluently? 🤔 As you guys know, I’ve been collabing and taking Spanish tutoring classes with @Preply I’ve been making skits and funny videos, but t
item.description: How come in the English-speaking world, nobody ever apologizes to tourists for not speaking another language fluently? 🤔 As you guys know, I’ve been collabing and taking Spanish tutoring classes with @Preply I’ve been making skits and funny videos, but t

item.title: I CAN’T BELIEVE THE DAY FINALLY CAME 🇨🇴💃🥹✨ Unfortunately I only have two weeks in Colombia, but I’m going to Medellín, Salento, and Cartagena! Also initially I didn’t have time to go to Bogotá, but now I’m thinking maybe I could stop over for 2 days? Shou

item.title: I used to think being ✨bilingual✨ was a flex until I moved to Germany lol 😂 I guess that’s why I had to pick up a third language and started learning Spanish! My Spanish is definitely not fluent yet, but I guess at least I can say I speak 2.5 languages n
item.description: I used to think being ✨bilingual✨ was a flex until I moved to Germany lol 😂 I guess that’s why I had to pick up a third language and started learning Spanish! My Spanish is definitely not fluent yet, but I guess at least I can say I speak 2.5 languages n

item.title: “The sooner I go to sleep the sooner I have to get up and have to do it all over again…” 🤡 #Free99 #lifeadvice #lifehacks #motivational
